tokens: Okay; I'm going to take some pictures going (back to the LM)...Wow, is that Sun bright!
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Pause) That navigation (system) has us right on!
You turn to 086, we'd be pointed right at that beauty (meaning the LM).
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Four more degrees and you got it!
Snockered (meaning that John has the Rover aimed at the LM).
You're about 084 and you'd have it.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Bracing himself) You're gonna have that big crater!
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Man, this is a fun ride.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Occasionally, the back end breaks loose, but there's no problem.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Hey, looking back up-Sun, the rays are even more pronounced.
Looking up-Sun rather than down-Sun, the blocks stand out like black spires.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It's just like driving on snow, Houston.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Gee, I know all about that.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: I know you do; but us Florida boys (chuckling) don't know much about it.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: It takes these small craters up to a meter (in diameter) just like a piece of cake.
You occasionally get blinded by the (reflections of the Sun off the) LCRU mirrors and the TCU mirror.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Oh, you mean (the direct Sun)...I got my thing down.

tokens: Lookit there, you can see your (geophone) flags out, John.

tokens: ...could you look at the amps during the higher speed part.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Okay; well, let us get a higher speed part.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Well, the voltage is...The switch is on Volts right now, John, and I don't want to move to reach down there.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, if Charlie moves the switch while we're driving, I turn left every time.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: By gosh, this is really something.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Look at that thing dig in.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Boy, we just missed a baddie.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Are you steering all four wheels?
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: I was really going slow at first.
I think it would be a problem when you're navigating under unknown terrain.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay; we've been making about 10 clicks, Tony, and going just super.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: But you see, going down-Sun or into the Sun - which we're not gonna be doing much of any more - is really...You can't plan ahead far enough to do yourself any good.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: That's why I was going so slow there at first (during the drive to Station 1).
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: We need to stop out here for the Grand Prix.

tokens: Here's a flat place, sort of.

tokens: (Pause) Okay, why don't we go over to the right, where the (core) stems are.
About boresighted on (meaning "heading toward") the LSM now.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That is a big one, John.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Tony, again, we're just driving by the ALSEP and apologize for that heat flow.
I wouldn't trade you...The drill seems to work just great, though.
I think it's in good shape right now for the next flight.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Here's a flat place right in here, Charlie.

tokens: Yeah, that's what I was thinking.
See, you could go out up that way and then out over that way towards the LM.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: A day ago, it didn't look like we were even gonna land, and now we've sampled our first highlands.

transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Well, I know Mark's disappointed, and I sure am.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Frankly, that was just a real shame.
That was my big moment, was to get that thing going.
Put this (Hasselblad) camera in here, John.

tokens: Let me get the 16(-mm camera) off.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I'll do it from there up towards this way.

transcript.speaker: Young

transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Why don't you just drive towards the LM.

tokens: Let me get it set here now.
Gonna be using the trigger, so (as per the notation at the top of
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Hey, that LM makes a nice looking house.

tokens: It ain't nothing much up here but a lot of rocks.

tokens: I said, I hope the door opens.

tokens: To start, I'm suppose to be about 50 meters or so from you.

tokens: And I'm not going to brake it, to amount to anything.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Is he on the ground at all...
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (To Tony) He's got about two wheels on the ground.
There's a big rooster tail out of all four wheels.
And as he turns, he skids.
The back end breaks loose just like on snow.
Man, I'll tell you, Indy (meaning the Indianapolis 500)'s never seen a driver like this.
(Pause) Okay, when he hits the craters and starts bouncing is when he gets his rooster tail.
Hey, that was a good stop.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Okay, you want to do it one more time?
transcript.speaker: Young

transcript.speaker: England

tokens: You could have gone the other way, but go ahead.

tokens: I don't want to run into those holes.

tokens: That was a minute and five (seconds).
Maybe you can do it twice more.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Laughing) I have no desire to turn sharp.
(Charlie laughs, too.) Okay, here's a sharpie.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Pause) Man, those things...When those wheels really dig in, John...When you turn is when you get the rooster tail.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: The suspension system on that thing is fantastic!
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: We sound like we probably got enough of the Grand Prix.
We're willing to let you go on from here.

tokens: (Pause) Man, that was all four wheels off the ground, there.

tokens: I don't want to do that.

tokens: I have a lot of confidence in the stability of this contraption.

tokens: After he saw the way you drove.

tokens: That's where we aligned it at.

tokens: We'll get them when you park (at the LM).

tokens: (Long Pause) Ain't nothing...There's nothing "plain" about this place, Houston, I'll tell you.

tokens: ...right out here that I described, that blue...

tokens: (Discussing a sample he has just collected) That blue one that I described from the lunar module window.

tokens: At least the part I'm looking at is it's not a breccia.
